name: Gainsight
description: Gainsight — Customer success platform for tracking health scores, automating lifecycle journeys, and NPS collection.

seo.title: Gainsight — CRM / Lifecycle Automation
seo.meta_description: Gainsight: Gainsight — Customer success platform for tracking health scores, automating lifecycle journeys, and NPS collection.

when_to_use: Automating CSM playbooks triggered by health score drops
NPS survey distribution and response tracking at scale
Risk flagging and early churn detection for enterprise SaaS
Lifecycle journey automation from onboarding to renewal
Customer health dashboard aggregating product usage signals

pros: Health scores and playbooks mature and proven
Deep integrations with Salesforce and Snowflake
Strong community and CS best-practice library
cons: Pricing sits at the top of the CS market
UI feels dated against newer tools like Vitally
Heavy for CS teams under 10 people
review.verdict: The incumbent CS platform - powerful and expensive. Modern alternatives often deliver 80% for 30%.
review.best_for: Enterprise CS orgs with 20+ CSMs and complex portfolios
review.not_for: Early-stage startups running CS from spreadsheets

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact-sales pricing; no explicit peak-lock evidence.
